## AI Video Creator v1.0.7

### Hotfix — desktop launch crash (v1.0.6 regression)
- Restored `require("./package.json")` in Electron main — window title used `pkg.version` without defining `pkg`, causing **`ReferenceError` on startup** in the v1.0.6 installer

Installed **v1.0.6** apps should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.
